sections_cited: Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 614 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 2761/2023. (urgent/app) 2) For orders on Misc. No. 2762/2023. (Exp/app) 3) For orders on Misc. No. 2763/2023. (Stay/app) 4) For hearing of main case. 31.01.2023. Ms. Lubna Pervez, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Qazi Ayazuddin Qureshi, Assistant Attorney General. __________ 1) Granted. 2) Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3 & 4) Through this Petition, the Petitioner has challenged the vires of Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. It appears that this Court has already decided this controversy vide Judgment dated 28.10.2022 passed in C. P. No. D-4614 of 2022 & other connected matters, whereby, the Petitions stand dismissed. Learned Assistant Attorney General present in Court has been directed to waive notice as the matter has already been decided. Accordingly, in view of above, this Petition is dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid Judgment dated 28.10.2022 passed in C. P. No. D-4614 of 2022 and other connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
